nodes.title: Discover batch images from glob or directory
nodes.description: discover_images: glob or directory listing filtered by image suffixes. Success: list of Paths. Failure: empty list when user expected files.

nodes.title: Run sequential batch transcribe
nodes.description: For each discovered image, build TranscribeJob; when skip_gm, resolve_lines_xml_for_image for --lines-xml or --lines-xml-dir; run_pipeline per image; write_batch_report. Success: per-image results. Failure: resolve or pipeline errors per job.
